home.title: Welcome to StepUP
home.tagline: The e-learning platform for sustainable audiovisual production
home.subtitle: Train in sustainable practices for the audiovisual industry. Online courses, interactive resources, and recognized certifications.
home.feature1Desc: Training paths designed by eco-production experts from the audiovisual industry.
home.feature2Desc: Explore worldwide data on an interactive map and access exclusive webinars.
home.feature3Desc: From cinema to animation, courses tailored to every profession in the audiovisual sector.

about.initiativeBanner: StepUP is a Eurimages initiative developed by Ecoprod.

eurimagesEcoprod.title: Eurimages & Ecoprod
eurimagesEcoprod.subtitle: StepUP is a Eurimages initiative developed by Ecoprod, bringing together European expertise for sustainable audiovisual production.
eurimagesEcoprod.eurimagesDesc: Eurimages is the Council of Europe's fund for the co-production, distribution, exhibition, and digitisation of European cinematographic works. Established in 1988, it supports the European film industry and promotes cultural diversity.
eurimagesEcoprod.ecoprodDesc: Ecoprod is a collective initiative dedicated to supporting the ecological transition of the audiovisual and cinema industry. Through tools, training, and resources, Ecoprod helps professionals reduce the environmental impact of their productions.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: StepUP is supported by a network of partners committed to sustainable audiovisual production across Europe.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.acceptanceText: By accessing and using the StepUP platform, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use this platform.
terms.usageText: StepUP is an educational platform dedicated to sustainable audiovisual production. You agree to use this platform only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You must not misuse the platform or attempt to access it using a method other than the interface provided.
terms.ipText: All content on the StepUP platform, including but not limited to courses, webinars, videos, text, graphics, and software, is the property of StepUP, Eurimages, Ecoprod, or their respective licensors. This content is protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws.
terms.liabilityText: StepUP is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We do not guarantee that the platform will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free. To the fullest extent permitted by law, StepUP shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages.
terms.modificationsText: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on the platform. Your continued use of StepUP after any changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.contactText: For any questions regarding these Terms of Use, please contact us at contact@stepup-platform.eu.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collectionText: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when registering, enrolling in courses, or contacting us. This may include your name, email address, and learning progress data.
privacy.useText: Your personal data is used to provide and improve our services, manage your account, track your learning progress, and communicate with you about courses and updates. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.cookiesText: StepUP uses essential cookies to ensure the proper functioning of the platform. Analytics cookies may be used to understand how the platform is used and to improve the user experience. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy.rightsText: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, delete, and port your personal data. You may also object to the processing of your data or request restriction of processing. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@stepup-platform.eu.
privacy.contactText: For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or data protection, please contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@stepup-platform.eu.
